rejected_candidates.title: Fee-on-transfer withdrawals burn the full stake even when the user receives less
rejected_candidates.reason: Rejected as a separate issue because the claimed shortfall comes from the token's own outbound transfer tax/burn semantics, while the contract balance also decreases by the full nominal amount. The material protocol-specific unsupported-token problems are already covered by F-004 and F-008.
